responses: Success is not final, failure is not fatal: it is the courage to continue that counts. Keep pushing, Cyphra is rooting for you!
Feeling stuck is just your brain's way of preparing for a breakthrough. Take a deep breath and take one small step today.
Every great journey starts with a single step. Don't look at the whole mountain; just look at the next step forward.
Believe in yourself. You are capable of achieving incredible goals!

text: How can I get a refund?

responses.text: Regarding billing: You can manage, upgrade, or cancel your subscription directly from the 'Billing' tab in your Dashboard. For refund requests, please email somanshch875@gmail.com with your transaction ID.

responses: Our refund process is straightforward. Standard subscription cancellations are processed within 5-7 business days. For billing discrepancies, please reach out to our financial team at somanshch875@gmail.com.
To initiate a refund or return, you can navigate to Account Settings inside your profile. If you have a specific billing issue, I can guide you to our support desk.
Subscription management is located in your account settings. If you cancel, you will retain access to your tier until the end of the current billing cycle.

responses.text: Cyphra offers high-performance conversational automation, rule-based custom pipelines, and a gorgeous responsive UI. Check out our main modules:

carousel.title: Contextual AI
carousel.description: Remembers flow context and handles complex matching smoothly.

carousel.title: Rich UI Output
carousel.description: Supports suggestion chips, multi-card carousels, and file streams.

carousel.title: Enterprise Security
carousel.description: Session encryption and XSS-safe response streams.

responses.text: Cyphra delivers low-latency conversational automation, rule-based custom matching pipelines, and an accessible responsive layout engine. Explore our primary core modules:

carousel.title: Contextual AI Matching
carousel.description: Compiles strict regex word boundary matrices to govern flow context smoothly.

carousel.title: Rich Multi-Card UX
carousel.description: Supports real-time suggestion chips, layout carousels, and fluid viewport transitions.

carousel.title: Cryptographic Security
carousel.description: Employs file-backed user data persistence, session protection, and thorough XSS sanitization.

responses.text: Cyphra is accessible to everyone. We offer a 'Starter Core' plan for ₹0, while our professional tiers provide advanced architectural tools for scaling.
Cyphra provides transparent tiering optimized for both growing setups and large-scale enterprise clusters:

carousel.title: Starter Plan
carousel.description: Ideal for initial testing. Includes standard rule sets and floating widget configurations.

carousel.title: Business Plan
carousel.description: Unlocks dashboard redocking matrices, custom rule uploads, and full local state history storage.

carousel.title: Enterprise Tier
carousel.description: Complete isolation clusters, high-concurrency routing layers, and custom API sync support.

responses.text: I'm here to help! If you're stuck, you can check our technical FAQ on the Help page, or tell me specifically what you're trying to do (e.g., 'pricing' or 'features' or 'about').
Our Knowledge Desk FAQ matrix is accessible on the main portal. Alternatively, ask me about 'features' or 'pricing' or 'about' to check capabilities directly.
I am Cyphra, a high-performance rule-based conversational entity designed to streamline platform interactions and automate architectural queries.
Cyphra is an advanced conversational framework designed for performance and security. I was built to demonstrate the power of rule-based logic combined with a modern UI.

carousel.title: The Vision
carousel.description: To bridge the gap between complex rule-based logic and fluid human interaction.

carousel.title: The Tech Stack
carousel.description: Built with Python, JSON-driven intent matrices, and a responsive frontend.
